positive: A highly stylized, geometric minimalist design featuring a celestial landscape. The main subject is a crescent moon intertwined with stylized planetary orbits and abstract constellations formed by clean, sharp geometric lines. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, ethereal gold, and matte navy blue. The composition is centrally balanced with strong contrast and negative space. The style should evoke Art Deco celestial charts meets modern vector art, suitable for a clean, repeating apparel pattern. High detail, crystal clear lines, crisp silhouette, graphic design, flat color wash, --ar 1:1
negative: blur, noise, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, cluttered, dirty, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs
